New Look On the Gallery
2003'4'8 ++ posted by JamJar
Today I have been busy making the new layout for the gallery, I have finished the bulk of the work, in time for the peak viewing hours, so I could re-open it again. Some minor things still need completing and approving by majin gohan, however the gallery is still functional. Hopefully loading times will be much faster now, and it will be more user friendly. I hope you like it, please e-mail me if you find any major errors. I hope all of you like it.

*NEW GALLERY LAYOUT

Viewers at Ease!!!
2003'4'5 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, this is quite the major revelation I would like to say. For those who have visited our site before, or visit reguarly, you may have noticed there was a Anime Babes (Hentai) button on the top of the right nav, along with some other advertisements. The reason we had them up is because the site was low in making money, and it was becoming tougher to pay the bills. Although now we seem to be steady again, and so those advertisements are NO MORE!!! Although just incase, I have left just one small Anime Babes text link, which is all. And sometimes you may see the button up for a day or two if we need a couple extra bucks. Otherwise you can all now surf through DBGT without having to see it!!! Which is good news for you sensitive viewers.

Although there is something else... because of this we arn't making a couple extra bucks incase the site needs it, and so in order to not have to put up that Ad again, I would like to ask the help of all you fans. I ask you to donate some money to DBGT if you can, no matter how much, whether it be 10cents or 10 dollars, every bit counts. To donate, send money through paypal to majingohan@dbgt.com And besides, my birthday is tommarow, just another good reason to donate some money. ^_- / So if you can, I ask that you please help out DBGT by donating to us / Thank You For Your Time Everyone!!! / MG Out...


Leaving but will be back
2003'4'5 ++ posted by Mystic Gojita
Hey sorry I havn't updated in AGES but I've been busy. Unfortiantly, I'm not going to be able to get online or work on DBNG for the next week or so.

So, I'm going to give ya'll an update on DBNG episode number 7. I'm about half-way done, but, like I said, I wont be able to work on it. I'm sorry that I havn't finished it yet but, like I said, I've been busy.

Mystic Gojita out...

What a post from sinister!?
2003'4'4 ++ posted by Sinister
Hello. Lol i havent posted in awhile. I have been busy doing some other stuff, like making my website(which will be up soon). Anyways i made a splash just now and sent it to mg so ill be back making stuff again now. hehe my new site is open! please come visit it! it has loads of anime contents, great layout and we are looking for affiliates! come visit please ( Anime Wrath )



I'm Back & A New Movie Synopsis is Here
2003'4'2 ++ posted by Kevin Phoenix
Hi folks. Sorry I've been away for a while. Life has been busy for me and I really needed the time off anyway to take care of some other matters. But now I'm back and there's more new stuff heading your way. The latest to be added to the movie synopsis lineup is Dragonball Z: Lord Slug.

The movie unfortunately has been regarded as one of the worst of the DBZ movies. But it has its moments. So without further delay, click here to read all about it.

New Addition: Dragonball Z Movie 4: Lord Slug

Goodbye, its been fun!
2003'4'2 ++ posted by SMGoten2
Well, I've decided to leave the dbgt.com staff.. Due to personal reasons and the fact that a new site (http://www.junk-head.com) has opened, and I'm the Co-Webby. It really has been great, and I enjoyed working with all the staff. Who knows, you guys may still see an episode summary or two =). Well, I'm off, and I wish all of the staff good luck, with whatever you guys continue to do.


Good-Bye, my friends.

//Goten//Log-Out.

DBGT Wins an Award!!!
2003'3'30 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, some of you may recall me asking you all to vote for DBGT at the DBAwards. Well, thanks to you the fans... DBGT managed to win the only category that we were nominated for, and that was "Most Recognized". This award goes out to all of the hard working staff here at DBGT... too many of you guys to mention... but my main boys Draton and JamJar... both of you have been with me from nearly the beginning. And of course, this is a big thanks to all of our fans... nothing is possible without you guys. Hopefully this inspires and motivates the staff to work hard... I know it has for me. Thanks alot once again! / More to come / MG Out...



Full Episodes / Movies Up!!!
2003'3'26 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, you might have noticed that we have a new media host. Our media is now shared with DBGTX2.COM. He has an excellent server and has let us have 3 eps and about 4 movies for the time being. We'll add more if the server can sustain DBGT's needs. The only irratating thing may be that you can only download at a maximum speed of about 10kb/sec... this way the server stays up longer. If the download doesn't work, just keep on trying.

For now, we have about 3 of the latest DBZ Episodes, and 4 DBZ Movies (6, 8, 10, 12). Some great eps, and some really awesome movie. Movie 8 has the first appearance of Brolly for all of those who have been asking. Once again, I don't know how long the media will stay up, hopefully for quite some time... and sorry about the lack of updates... the staff just needs a small rest... me included / More To Come / MG Out...

*Full DBZ Episodes
*Full DBZ Movies

1500 New Images
2003'3'22 ++ posted by JamJar
Hey people, sorry for the lack of recent updates. I have managed to upload 1500 New anime images to the gallery, there is still alot to come in dew time, maybe a week or two. I hope you enjoy these new images, you can visit them in the gallery, they are in the anime section. I'm also looking at getting a bigger media server for for more images and video clips.

SITE INFORMATION

Website Bio:.
Site Layout Revision: 10/19/02
Site Creation: -'97
Webmaster: Majin Gohan
Founded By: Ruben Rodas
Site Layout Copyright: Halovision
Site Statistics:
Live Stats: 2 users online

NEWS TICKER
Site News: The Site is moving along and growing gradually, it may be slow, but we are moving at a good steady pace so this site can regain the calibur it once had. We currently have an excellent staff who is bringing you lots of original information and interaction on the site. We're also constantly working on having media up, and having it stay up for as long as possible / Keep Visitng /

Majin Gohan is literally working all the time for you, the DBGT fans. He works on everything the staff dishes to him plus projects of his own. So make sure you visit DBGT often for his updates.

Donate: Running the site is getting harder and harder because of the server costs, which are well over $100. Since we need a really good server to suit DBGT's needs and to give a pleasant time for you the fans, it could be made easier however through donations. So if you got a couple extra bucks lying around or just want to help us out, please donate to the site using the paypal button above / Thank You All! /


Please Click This To Support Us
